title: Private Columns on the Same Board
excerpt: I would like the ability to set the privacy of columns on the same board, meaning that not all board members can see all the columns. In many cases, there are columns with confidential information that I don’t want other…

posts.author: Davesaint (David Herrera)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like the ability to set the privacy of columns on the same board, meaning that not all board members can see all the columns. In many cases, there are columns with confidential information that I don’t want other areas to see. Currently, it is only possible to set the privacy for the entire board.

posts.author: aspurlock (Amy Spurlock)
posts.cookedHtml:
You can restrict the view at the column level!

Three dots on the column header, Settings, Restrict Column View

Once you select this, by default board owners can see the column, but you can add non board owners to the settings to be able to view the column if you wish.

Hope this helps!
